codeReview.summary: The finance/reporting/audit review doc satisfies VAL-FIN-001. It covers accounting bootstrap and defaults, balanced journal posting, maker/checker period close, reconciliation layers, GST/tax handling, payroll accounting, audit-trail surfaces, report/export governance, temporal reporting, and the GRN versus purchase-invoice double-posting boundary with concrete code and test evidence.

summary: PASS. The finance/reporting/audit review artifact is complete, internally consistent with the underlying controllers/services/tests, and documents the required controls, invariants, auditability risks, and accounting-boundary findings without scrutiny-level defects.
